name: Banana Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together flour, curry powder, and soy sauce; coat bananas and fish with this mixture; set aside.
2. Heat oil in a skillet.
3. Stir-fry celery until crisp; set aside.
4. Add butter to the hot oil; sauté bananas until golden, about 1 minute on each side.
5. Sprinkle bananas with half of the lemon juice; transfer to a serving dish.
6. Sauté fish in the oil/butter mixture until it comes away easily from a fork, about 3 minutes per side.
7. Sprinkle remaining lemon juice over fish.
8. Place fish and bananas on the serving dish.
9. Spoon celery over the fish.
